title: Human Islets - Preprocessing
author: Opentrons
materials: Digest the islets for 9 min at 37oC thermo incubator.
Aspirate and discard 180 μl of supernatant

steps.title: For detailed protocol steps, please see below
steps.instruction: For detailed protocol steps, please see below. The trash will be used as a waste reservoir for supernatant removal. This protocol is for full plates (96 samples) exclusively. The protocol will pause to prompt the user to replace tips when needed, and pause for certain centrifuging steps.

steps.title: Manually picked 1 islet per well...
steps.instruction: Manually picked 1 islet per well into a 96-well plate with 100 μl of PBS pre-added into each well.

steps.title: Spin down the plate at 200g for 5 min
steps.instruction: Spin down the plate at 200g for 5 min.

steps.title: Add 100 μl of pre-warmed 0
steps.instruction: Add 100 μl of pre-warmed 0.05% Trypsin into each well.

steps.title: Pipette trituration with a volume of...
steps.instruction: Pipette trituration with a volume of 80 μl 12 times towards the end of incubation.

steps.title: Stop the digestion by adding 100...
steps.instruction: Stop the digestion by adding 100 μl of PBS+10%FBS into each well. Pipette mix.

steps.title: Spin down the plate at 400g for 5 min
steps.instruction: Spin down the plate at 400g for 5 min.

steps.title: Wash once with 100 μl of PBS+10%FBS/well
steps.instruction: Wash once with 100 μl of PBS+10%FBS/well. Pipette mix.

steps.title: Spin down the plate at 400g for 5 min
steps.instruction: Spin down the plate at 400g for 5 min.

steps.title: Add 100 μl of cold methanol into each well
steps.instruction: Add 100 μl of cold methanol into each well. Incubate at -20oC for 10 min.

steps.title: Spin down the plate at 800g...
steps.instruction: Spin down the plate at 800g for 5 min at 4oC.

steps.title: Wash cells with 200 μl of wash-resuspension buffer (3xSSC+0
steps.instruction: Wash cells with 200 μl of wash-resuspension buffer (3xSSC+0.5 %BSA+0.2U/μl RNase inhibitor + 1mM DTT). Pipette mix 3x.
